ab: Natayra kaku i niyaru’ a milisu’ ci vakian i nacila.
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: Matenesay tu kami a caay kasasuaraw, maurun tu kaku i ciraan.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: Melaw saan ci vaki i takuwan, pakaenan kaku tu ciyak, pananuman aca kaku tu ociya.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: Sicedam tu nipalumaan ni vaki tu ciyak, saalesu’ sa a kaenen.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: U maulahay:tu kaku tu ociya ni vaki, alesu’ aca a nananuman.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: Misakalahuk kaku aci vayi aku i kalahukan.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: Adihay ku nicacakan ni vayi tu sakalahuk, sivuting, siayam, sitamurak atu kacumuli.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ab: Herek sa namalahuk, tayra kami i padatengan a mikituc tu dateng.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: Adihay ku nipaahen ni vayi tu vunga, tali atu lukiyu i takuwan, u sapataluma’ nu maku saan.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: A miliyas hen kaku tu henian, rumaaw tu aca a milisu’ i tu henian.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
